name: com.bidscube.sdk
description: Bidscube advertising for Unity — two integration paths: (1) Direct SDK — C# APIs for banner, fullscreen video/VAST, native, and interstitials against your SSP. (2) AppLovin MAX — Bidscube as a custom mediated network; Android ships the MAX adapter AAR; Unity Editor injects com.bidscube:bidscube-sdk from Maven Central as @aar (pinned in Constants.NativeAndroidBidscubeSdkVersion), AppLovin SDK 13.x, Media3, IMA, UMP, Glide, Material; core library desugaring is never injected (host Gradle; NoDesugarMode toggles export warning). iOS uses bundled WebView plugins and optional CocoaPods BidscubeSDKAppLovin. UPM 1.0.5: Android Gradle @aar + no-plugin-desugar mode; use Git tag v1.0.5.

samples.description: Example scenes and scripts demonstrating the Bidscube Unity SDK.
